global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with promotional text and a call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting fast food delivery with a special offer.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A vibrant solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a bright and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: Placeholder for app screenshot
elements.description: A rectangular placeholder in the center, designed to represent an app screenshot, with a light outline.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: Bold white text in the center reads 'Fast food, fast Free delivery over $15', conveying a clear promotional message.
elements.text_content: Fast food, fast Free delivery over $15

elements.label: QuickFork logo
elements.description: The logo 'QuickFork' appears at the top left in a bold font, colored white against the blue background.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom center with the text 'Get offer' in white, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: A small text at the bottom left shows the price '€9.99' in white, indicating the cost of the offer.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A circular badge at the top right with the word 'SALE' in bold yellow text, highlighting a special offer.
